prompt:
Goal: Create a vertical grand-opening construction-hoarding poster for a French dessert shop, combining a premium cream-and-gold brand visual, 3D folded barricade display, large promotional headline, pastry photography, and store information.

Canvas: Portrait 9:16 poster, warm ivory marble background with subtle whipped-cream swirls, soft mall lighting, elegant beige and caramel palette, premium patisserie mood.

Top brand area: Centered small arched logo icon containing a moon and pastry, brand name Lune Pâtisserie in refined serif type, smaller Chinese brand subtitle 月峙甜点. Below it place the spaced English line “NEW STORE OPENS” with thin decorative dots and horizontal strokes.

Main headline: Very large dark-brown Chinese brush-calligraphy headline 拍照打卡·领甜点. Under it, create a rounded gold capsule badge with huge white “500” on the left and Chinese offer text 份可领免费领 on the right inside a thin gold outline pill.

Central 3D hoarding installation: Show one large folded, three-panel freestanding store hoarding display in perspective, like a premium pop-up wall placed inside a mall. Count exactly 3 visible panels:
1. Left panel: cream marble/whipped texture background, large “Lune Pâtisserie” serif text, stacked Chinese copy meaning French baking, handmade desserts, butter aroma, just met you; a realistic golden croissant at the bottom with crumbs; tiny English text “FRENCH PASTRIES HANDMADE WITH LOVE” and a small round seal.
2. Center panel: lighter cream panel facing front, small logo and brand name at top, a taped paper notice in the middle with Chinese promotion text including “500份” and free-claim wording, smaller lines about checking in by photo and activity time; beige tape strips at corners; handwritten script near bottom reading “Croissant And Sweet Moments.”
3. Right panel: cream panel angled away, large gold “LUNE PÂTISSERIE” at top, faint line-art Eiffel Tower and French architecture, taped note with Chinese copy about drawing a store-opening card and receiving desserts, realistic plated cream-filled croissant at the bottom right.

Bottom information area: Add a location row with a map-pin icon and bold text “LUNE PÂTISSERIE 月峙甜点 CCMALL 店”. Beneath it add one centered Chinese sentence meaning looking forward to meeting you and smelling butter and baking fragrance on every passing walk. Create exactly 3 bottom info blocks separated by thin vertical lines: left block “2026” with Chinese label for opening time; center block CENTRAL MALL L2 层; right block a scannable-looking QR code with small Chinese caption meaning scan to learn more. Finish with a full-width caramel footer strip reading “SOFT LAYERS, SWEET MOMENTS.” in widely spaced white letters.

Visual style: High-end commercial poster, realistic pastry photography blended with 3D mockup rendering, soft shadows, shallow depth of field, polished mall floor reflections, warm natural highlights, elegant serif typography mixed with expressive Chinese calligraphy, clean luxury dessert branding.

Constraints: Keep the composition symmetrical and poster-like, use exactly one main 3D hoarding object with 3 visible panels, exactly one large croissant on the left panel and one plated croissant on the right panel, no extra people, no watermark, no unrelated text.
